examples: She suddenly realized the oddity of her remark and blushed.
Although it felt somewhat disquieting at first, I realized that my presence was perhaps an oddity with so few foreigners in that area.
The only oddity was the oxygen tanks.
The Duggars are an oddity today, but families with their disposition will inherit the earth.
Bowie himself acknowledged the video, tweeting, " CHRIS HADFIELD SINGS SPACE ODDITY IN SPACE!"
